error_snippets: Checking PR title: fix(kernel): recompute kernel fixed-length case bugfix
PR title must contain one of the following prefixes: [BugFix], [Performance], [Test], [CI], [Feature], [Doc], [Misc], [Community], [Refactor]
Example: '[Feature] Add new optimization pass' or 'Add new feature [Feature]'
command terminated with non-zero exit code: command terminated with exit code 1
analyses.root_cause: PR title 'fix(kernel): recompute kernel fixed-length case bugfix' uses conventional commit format (fix(scope): message) but the vllm-ascend CI validation requires bracket-style prefixes like [BugFix]. The grep pattern VALID_PREFIXES='\[(BugFix|Performance|Test|CI|Feature|Doc|Misc|Community|Refactor)\]' did not match the title.
fix_suggestions: Rename PR title to include a bracket prefix, e.g. '[BugFix] recompute kernel fixed-length case bugfix'
Alternatively, update the VALID_PREFIXES regex in _pre_commit.yml to also accept conventional commit prefixes like 'fix:', 'feat:', 'perf:', 'test:', 'ci:', 'docs:', 'refactor:'
